+{"timestamp":1774427024533,"source_app":"agentic-harness","session_id":"cfa66fd9-7959-4d3a-8e1c-51f0b0cc5fbd","hook_event_type":"PostToolUse","tool_name":"Read","tool_use_id":"toolu_013qJ5ain5oWYdMxEbbcmXAf","payload":{"session_id":"cfa66fd9-7959-4d3a-8e1c-51f0b0cc5fbd","transcript_path":"/Users/auto/.claude/projects/-Users-auto-agentic-harness-apps-mas-trees-bdf67753/cfa66fd9-7959-4d3a-8e1c-51f0b0cc5fbd.jsonl","cwd":"/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/bdf67753","permission_mode":"bypassPermissions","hook_event_name":"PostToolUse","tool_name":"Read","tool_input":{"file_path":"/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/bdf67753/specs/issue-bdf67753-adw-1d78f7d6-sdlc_planner-hide-free-trial-ctas-plan-pages.md"},"tool_response":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/bdf67753/specs/issue-bdf67753-adw-1d78f7d6-sdlc_planner-hide-free-trial-ctas-plan-pages.md","content":"# Plan: Hide Free Trial CTAs on plan pages

## Task Description
Remove Free Trial CTA buttons from the footer of `plans` and `plans-v2` merch card variants. Free Trial CTAs are checkout links/buttons whose `data-analytics-id` attribute matches one of the trial-related IDs: `free-trial`, `start-free-trial`, `seven-day-trial`, `fourteen-day-trial`, `thirty-day-trial`. These must be filtered out at the component level (not via CSS) during CTA processing, so they are never rendered in the DOM.

## Relevant Files

| File | Action | Reason |
|------|--------|--------|
| `web-components/src/hydrate.js` | Edit | `processCTAs()` is where CTAs are transformed and appended; filter trial CTAs for plans variants here |
| `web-components/src/constants.js` | Read | Already contains relevant analytics IDs (`CHECKOUT_CTA_TEXTS`) — use as reference |
| `web-components/src/variants/plans.js` | Read | Verify variant name strings (`'plans'`, `'plans-education'`, `'plans-students'`) |
| `web-components/src/variants/plans-v2.js` | Read | Verify variant name string (`'plans-v2'`) |

## Step by Step Tasks

### 1. Define the Free Trial analytics IDs constant
In `web-components/src/hydrate.js`, add a constant near the top of the file listing the trial-related analytics IDs:

```js
const FREE_TRIAL_CTA_IDS = new Set([
    'free-trial',
    'start-free-trial',
    'seven-day-trial',
    'fourteen-day-trial',
    'thirty-day-trial',
]);
```

### 2. Define the plan variants set
In `web-components/src/hydrate.js`, add a constant for the plan page variants:

```js
const PLANS_VARIANTS = new Set(['plans', 'plans-education', 'plans-students', 'plans-v2']);
```

### 3. Filter trial CTAs in `processCTAs`
In `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, variant)`, after the CTA links are queried from the footer div (line ~690), filter out any link whose `data-analytics-id` is in `FREE_TRIAL_CTA_IDS` when `variant` is in `PLANS_VARIANTS`:

```js
export function processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, variant) {
    if (fields.ctas) {
        fields.ctas = processMnemonicElements(fields.ctas);

        const { slot } = aemFragmentMapping.ctas;
        const footer = createTag('div', { slot }, fields.ctas);
        let ctas = [...footer.querySelectorAll('a')];
        if (PLANS_VARIANTS.has(variant)) {
            ctas = ctas.filter(
                (cta) => !FREE_TRIAL_CTA_IDS.has(cta.dataset.analyticsId),
            );
        }
        const buttons = ctas.map((cta) =>
            transformLinkToButton(cta, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping),
        );

        footer.innerHTML = '';
        footer.append(...buttons);
        merchCard.append(footer);
    }
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- Free Trial CTA buttons (`free-trial`, `start-free-trial`, `seven-day-trial`, `fourteen-day-trial`, `thirty-day-trial`) are not rendered in the DOM for `plans`, `plans-education`, `plans-students`, and `plans-v2` merch card variants.
- Non-trial CTAs (e.g., `buy-now`, `get-started`) continue to render normally on all plan variants.
- CTAs on non-plan variants (e.g., `fries`, `full-pricing-express`, `simplified-pricing-express`) are unaffected.
- No CSS `display:none` is used — elements are removed before DOM insertion.
- Surrounding footer layout is preserved (no broken spacing or empty slot issues).

    if (fields.ctas) {
        // Process tooltips in CTAs
        fields.ctas = processMnemonicElements(fields.ctas);

        const { slot } = aemFragmentMapping.ctas;
        const footer = createTag('div', { slot }, fields.ctas);
        let ctas = [...footer.querySelectorAll('a')];
        if (PLANS_VARIANTS.has(variant)) {
            ctas = ctas.filter(
                (cta) => !FREE_TRIAL_CTA_IDS.has(cta.dataset.analyticsId),
            );
        }
        ctas = ctas.map((cta) =>
            transformLinkToButton(cta, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping),
        );

        footer.innerHTML = '';
        footer.append(...ctas);
        merchCard.append(footer);
    }
}
